name: System Owner or User Discovery
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: System Owner or User Discovery
SIGMA Description: Adversaries may use the information from System Owner/User Discovery during automated discovery to shape follow-on behaviors, including whether or not the adversary fully infects the target and/or attempts specific actions.

False positives:
- Admin activity

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%users%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%w%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%who%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY System Owner or User Discovery on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%users%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%w%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%who%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: System Owner or User Discovery
